trmnl_setup.title: TRMNL Setup
trmnl_setup.description:
Before entering the webhook URL, create a plugin on trmnl.com:

1. Go to **Plugins** → **Webhook Image**
2. Give it a name, set **Image Fit Mode** to **Contain**, and click **Save**
3. Copy the **Webhook URL** — it looks like `https://trmnl.com/api/custom_plugins/<uuid>`

Select **Submit** when ready to enter the URL.

data_description.name: A label for this push target (e.g. Kitchen TRMNL)
data_description.webhook_url: From usetrmnl.com: device settings → Private API Plugin → webhook URL

data_description.name: A label for this push target (e.g. Hallway TRMNL)
data_description.webhook_url: From usetrmnl.com: device settings → Private API Plugin → webhook URL

data_description.optimize: Apply autocontrast, sharpening, and quantization for e-ink displays
data_description.grayscale_levels: Number of grayscale shades (fewer = higher contrast, more banding)

error.already_configured: This webhook URL is already configured.
